title: Realistic Time Clock
description: a VANILLA clock resorcepack shows you the time in the real world
body:
![Clock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ee728ede201dbb1ac06cca70849e431e3708af9.png)
This is a clock resorcepack that can show you the time in the real world. 
> 这是一个可以让你的时钟显示现实时间的资源包。

Your clock will read and show you your system time after installing this pack. It only supports 12-hour-cycle format and timing on the second so far.
> 安装资源包后，时钟会读取并显示电脑系统设置的时间，目前仅支持 hh:mm:ss 即十二小时制精确到秒

Only support 24w46a and above cuz resourcepacks can freely read the time only in this version.
> 仅支持24w46a+，因为只有这个版本的资源包才可以自定义读取时间

![icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f840544ca7018f0470fcd2eb5f2b50f3cf27bbe_0.webp)
